name: Catan
description: Trade resources and build settlements while competing to expand your civilization.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Collect train cards and claim railway routes across North America.

name: Carcassonne
description: Build cities, roads, and farms by placing tiles and followers.

name: Azul
description: Draft colorful tiles and create beautiful patterns to score points.

name: Pandemic
description: Work together to stop global disease outbreaks before time runs out.

name: Wingspan
description: Attract birds to your wildlife preserves and build powerful combinations.

name: Splendor
description: Collect gems and develop trade routes to attract prestigious nobles.

name: Terraforming Mars
description: Lead a corporation and transform Mars into a habitable planet.

name: 7 Wonders
description: Develop an ancient civilization through military, science, and commerce.

name: Root
description: Competing woodland factions battle for control of the forest.

name: Dixit
description: Use imagination and storytelling to interpret beautiful artwork.

name: King of Tokyo
description: Become a giant monster and battle for control of Tokyo.

name: Cascadia
description: Create harmonious habitats and wildlife ecosystems in the Pacific Northwest.

name: Betrayal at House on the Hill
description: Explore a haunted mansion until one player turns against the others.

name: Gloomhaven
description: A massive campaign-based dungeon crawler with tactical combat.
